description: 100 evaluation prompts aligned to abstract-style categories. Replace topic strings with your corpus seeds or headlines if you use fixed inputs.

stories.prompt: Research and deliver a verified news-style briefing on municipal budget hearings and council decisions in a mid-size US city this year. Target ~500 words in the final edited article. Run the full pipeline (reporter, fact-checker, editor).
